exercises.name: SL kneeling squat w/ KB press
SL kneeling squat w/ narrow KB/DB press
SL prone hamstring curl glute emphasis
SL RDL hold w/ DB row
exercises.description: Make sure to switch legs

exercises.name: Sled Drag Isometric Chest Fly
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, your arms will be held far away from your body. 

2) From there, you’ll also want to set your abdominals, so slightly forward flex through the spine and drive through the glutes and the lower body to push the sled forward.

exercises.name: Sled Pull
exercises.description:
Attach a harness or ropes to a weighted sled. 

Face away from the sled and walk forward, pulling the sled behind you. 

Keep your core engaged and maintain a steady pace.

exercises.name: Sled Pull Through
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, you’ll want to maintain nice set back and drive from the hips.

2) As you reach the top of the pull through, you’ll want to reach your abdominals are on and that you’re not leaning back through your back.

exercises.name: Sled Push
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, you’ll want to maintain straight arms and abdominals engaged.

2) Drive from the hips and legs as best as you can.

exercises.name: Sled Reverse Isometric Fly Drag
exercises.description:
1) Set arms in a back fly position; arms stretched out just below 90 degrees at your shoulders, light elbow bend, squeeze between your shoulder blades. 

2) Walk/run backwards without letting your hands/arms change position, maintaining an active back.

3) Complete prescribed duration.

exercises.name: Sled Row
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, you’ll want to set yourself so that you’re square and centered on your feet.

2) From there, you’re going to set back far enough that you can pull between the shoulder blades to roll the sled.

3) Then, you’ll take a step back.

exercises.name: Sled Squat and Row
exercises.description:
1) Set your back, feet at a stance prepared for a squat.

2) Row as you lean back and stand out of your squat. 

3) Step back and plant feet in a squat stance again and repeat.

exercises.name: Slider Alternating Push Up from Knee
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, ensure straight line from your knees to the top of your head. To do so, keep your abdominals and your glutes on.

2.Begin with your hands (palms) on the sliders. Support your body with your arms and elbows straight while keeping your knees on the ground. 

3.Extend right arm forward until your body touches the ground while keeping the left hand in place. Then back to starting position. Then do the same on your left hand. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Atomic Push Up
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, maintain neutral spine by engaging your abdominals and keeping your glutes on. 

2.For the pushup, ensure that your elbows and hands are mid chest. 

3.With your feet on the sliders, begin in the "up" position of a push-up: arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

4.Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at the elbows until they reach a 90-degree position. Then back to starting position. 

5. Then, pull your legs towards your chest with your knees slightly bent. During this movement, your hips will rise upward. Continue the movement until your hips are higher than your shoulders. Back to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Atomic Push Up From Knee
exercises.description:
1.When performing the push up component of this exercise, ensure a straight line between your knees and your head by keeping your abdominals engaged and glutes on.

2.Begin with your feet on the sliders. Support your body with your arms and elbows straight while keeping your knees on the ground.

3.Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at the elbows until they reach a 90-degree position. 

4.Then pull your body up along with your knees in a push up position.

5. Then, pull your legs towards your chest with your knees bent. During this movement, your hips will rise upward. Back to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Atomic Push Up With Band
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep an engaged core. 

2.When you do your pushups, have your elbows and hands in line mid chest. 

3.With your feet on the sliders and feet attached to a band, begin in the "up" position of a push-up: arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

4.Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at the elbows until they reach a 90-degree position. Then back to starting position. 

5. Then, pull your legs towards your chest with your knees slightly bent. During this movement, your hips will rise upward. Continue the movement until your hips are higher than your shoulders. Back to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Banded Tuck
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, shorten the distance between your ribs and your hips. That’ll will help in keep your abdominals engaged.

3.With your feet on the sliders and feet attached to a band, arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

4.Pull one knee towards your elbow, then, back to starting position. 

5.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

6.When you’ve completed one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Cross Mountain Climber
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals and glutes engaged maintaining neutral spine.

2.With your feet on the sliders begin in the exercise with your arms extended on the ground to support the body, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight.

3.Bring one knee from one side of your body to the elbow of the opposite side of your body, and then alternate.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Elbow Plank Body Saw
exercises.alternateName: slider core plank back and forth
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your core engaged particularly your abdominals. You wanna keep it slightly shorten between the bottom of your ribs and the top of your hips. 

2.When you’re sliding over to of your elbows, be sure to engage your lats by pulling your shoulder blade down.

3.Position your body by keeping your feet on the sliders. Use your elbows to support the body. This will be your starting position.

4.While keeping a straight body, push your feet backwards then back to starting position.

5.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Half Burpee
exercises.description:
1.While performing this exercise, you’ll wanna keep your abdominals engaged particularly when you are in the push up position.

2.With your feet on the sliders begin in the "up" position of a push-up: arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. 

3. Then pull yourself up standing position . And raise both arms all the way up. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Hamstring Curl
exercises.description: Lie on your back with feet on sliders. Lift hips and slide feet out, then pull them back in while maintaining a bridge.

exercises.name: Slider High Plank Body Saw
exercises.alternateName: slider core plank back and forth
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you wanna keep your core engaged. You can do so by shortening the distance between the lower ribs and the top of your hips. 

2.Position your body by keeping your feet on the sliders. Use your hands while keeping arms and elbows straight, to support the body. This will be your starting position.

3.While keeping a straight body, push your feet backwards then back to starting position.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider High Plank Hip Abduction
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, maintain neutral spine. That means abdominals engaged ang glutes on. 

2.With your feet on the sliders begin the exercise with arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. 

3. Open your legs as wide as you can while keeping your upper body straight with arms supporting the body. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider High Plank Walk
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals set to maintain neutral spine throughout.

2.With your feet on the sliders, begin in the exercise with your arms extended to the ground, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. 

3.Move forward while keeping your arms and body straight. Then move backwards.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Hip Can Openers
exercises.description: Use sliders under both feet, opening your hips by rotating your knees outward and bringing them back together while keeping your core engaged.

exercises.name: Slider Jack Knife
exercises.description: Slider Jack Knife

exercises.name: Slider Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Place a slider under one foot, step laterally with the other leg, and lower into a squat, then push back to starting position.
